source_jobs.title: Agent in Training - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Agent in Training – Farmers Insurance | Ryan Underhill Agency, Kentwood

 

Are you ready to launch a rewarding sales career with a well-established leader in the insurance industry? The Ryan Underhill Agency, part of Farmers Insurance, is seeking a motivated and ambitious Agent in Training to join our high-performing team in Kentwood.

 

As an Agent in Training, you will:

 - Play a key role in generating new business, providing tailored insurance solutions, and supporting a dynamic team environment

 - Collaborate with experienced professionals to deepen your knowledge of insurance sales and client service

 - Build lasting relationships with clients while helping them choose the right coverage for their needs

 

What We Offer:

 - Comprehensive training, dedicated mentorship, and ongoing professional development

 - Clear career progression, including advancement into leadership and opportunities for agency ownership

 - Supportive, achievement-focused culture that values teamwork and growth

 

Primary Responsibilities:

 - Identify, engage, and convert new leads into long-term clients

 - Consult with individuals and businesses to assess their insurance needs and provide customized coverage options

 - Sell and cross-sell insurance products, including Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial policies

 - Deliver superior customer service through regular client contact and policy reviews

 - Consistently meet or exceed individual sales targets to contribute to overall agency growth

 - Stay up to date on insurance products, market trends, and compliance regulations

 - Effectively use CRM tools to manage leads, follow-ups, and policy renewals

 - Participate in team meetings and support agency-wide sales initiatives

 

Who We’re Looking For:

 - Minimum one year of experience in sales, customer service, or a related field (insurance experience a plus)

 - Exceptional communication and negotiation skills

 - Confident making outbound calls and closing sales

 - Eager to learn, open to coaching, and willing to develop professionally

 - Strong organizational and time management skills

 - Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health licenses preferred (or willingness to obtain)

 - Bilingual abilities are an advantage

 

Benefits:

 - Base salary with unlimited commission potential

 - Performance bonuses and incentive programs

 - Paid training and professional development

 - Advancement opportunities, with a pathway to agency ownership

 - Supportive, team-driven culture with recognition for achievements

 - Health insurance, paid time off, holidays, and milestone incentives (benefits dependent on agency offering)

 - Backing of the respected Farmers Insurance brand

 

Start Your Insurance Career Today!

 

Joining the Ryan Underhill Agency as an Agent in Training is more than just a job—it’s the first step toward a successful and meaningful career in insurance. If you’re driven and ready to grow as a sales professional, we want to meet you.

 

Apply now to begin your journey with Farmers Insurance and the Ryan Underhill Agency in Kentwood.

source_jobs.title: Agent in Training - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Agent in Training – Farmers Insurance | Eric Rodriguez Agency, Long Beach, CA

 

Ignite Your Sales Career with a Leading Insurance Agency!

 

Are you ambitious, energetic, and ready to start an exciting new chapter with a respected name in insurance? The Eric Rodriguez Agency is searching for a passionate, driven Agent in Training to join our dynamic Long Beach team and experience the rewards of a successful sales career!

 

What You'll Do
As an Agent in Training, you’ll drive revenue growth, deliver personalized insurance solutions, and contribute to a vibrant, team-focused environment. If you love building connections, embrace challenges, and want to play an important part in your clients’ lives, this is your opportunity to shine!

 

Your Path to Success

 - Launch your career with comprehensive training, mentorship, and advancement opportunities—including leadership roles and future agency ownership.

 - Access top-tier tools and the strength of a nationally recognized insurance brand.

 - Enjoy a positive, high-energy culture that rewards achievement and supports professional growth.

 

What You’ll Tackle

 - Identify and engage new prospects—turning connections into loyal clients.

 - Consult with individuals and businesses to understand their unique needs and recommend meaningful coverage.

 - Cross-sell a full suite of insurance products—Auto, Home, Life, Commercial, and more.

 - Build lasting relationships through attentive service, regular reviews, and proactive support.

 - Surpass sales goals and help the agency reach new milestones.

 - Stay current with ongoing product training and compliance awareness.

 - Use CRM software to track leads, follow-ups, and renewals.

 - Collaborate with your team to strategize and win together!

 

What You Bring

 - 1+ year sales, customer service, or insurance experience (preferred)

 - Excellent communication and negotiation skills

 - Confidence in phone conversations and sales closings

 - Eagerness to learn, adapt, and take coaching

 - Strong organizational skills and a results-driven mindset

 - Bilingual skills are a plus!

 

Why You'll Love It Here

 - Base salary plus unlimited commission potential

 - Exciting performance-based bonuses and incentives

 - Paid training and continuous learning opportunities

 - Clear path for career growth, including potential agency ownership

 - Supportive, team-oriented environment that celebrates success

 - Health insurance support options (varies by agency)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and special milestone rewards

 - The stability and reputation of the Farmers Insurance brand supporting you at every stage

 

Ready to Make Your Mark?
This isn’t just another job—it’s the springboard for your insurance career! If you’re passionate, motivated, and ready to excel, the Eric Rodriguez Agency wants to hear from you.

 

Apply now and jumpstart your journey toward success with a team—and a future—you’ll be proud of!

source_jobs.title: Insurance Sales Trainee – Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
INSURANCE SALES TRAINEE – FARMERS INSURANCE | KYLE CAMPBELL AGENCY

Ignite Your Sales Career with a Leading Insurance Agency!

 

Are you ambitious, energetic, and ready to launch a thrilling new chapter with a trusted name in insurance? The Kyle Campbell is searching for a passionate, driven Insurance Sales Trainee to join our dynamic Lansing team and experience the excitement of a rewarding sales career!

 


WHAT YOU'LL DO

As an Insurance Sales Trainee, you’ll be at the forefront—growing revenue, delivering personalized insurance solutions, and helping cultivate a lively, team-first environment. If you thrive on making connections, love a great challenge, and want to be a valued part of your clients’ journeys, this is your moment to shine!

 


YOUR PATH TO SUCCESS

 - Launch your career with comprehensive training, mentorship, and a pathway to advancement, including leadership roles

 - Access top-tier tools and the power of a nationally recognized insurance brand.

 - Celebrate achievements in a positive, high-energy culture that recognizes effort and supports professional growth.

 


WHAT YOU’LL TACKLE

 - Identify and engage new prospects, turn connections into clients!

 - Consult with individuals and businesses to understand their needs and recommend coverage that truly matters.

 - Cross-sell a wide variety of insurance products - Auto, Home, Life, Commercial, and more.

 - Build long-term relationships with support, reviews, and exceptional service.

 - Surpass sales goals and help the agency soar to new heights.

 - Stay sharp with ongoing product training and compliance awareness.

 - Leverage CRM software to track leads, follow-ups, and renewals.

 - Collaborate with your team to strategize and WIN!

 


WHAT YOU BRING

 - 1+ year sales, customer service, or insurance experience (preferred)

 - Enthusiastic communication and negotiation skills

 - Confidence on the phone and in closing sales

 - Willingness to learn, adapt, and take coaching

 - Stellar organization and drive to get things done

 - Bilingual skills—a huge plus!

 


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

 - Base salary PLUS unlimited commission potential

 - Exciting performance bonuses and incentives

 - Paid training and continuous learning opportunities

 - Career growth

 - A supportive, celebration-filled team environment

 - Health insurance support options (vary by agency)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and special milestone rewards

 - The security of the Farmers Insurance brand backing every step you take

 

Ready to Make Your Mark?
This isn’t just another job, it’s the launchpad for your career in insurance! If you’re passionate, unstoppable, and ready to excel, the Kyle Campbell Agency wants to hear from you.

 

Apply now and jumpstart your journey toward success with a team you’ll be proud of!

source_jobs.title: New Agency Business Advisor - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Empower New Agencies. Build the Future of Farmers Insurance.

 

New Agency Business Advisor | Farmers Insurance District 40

 

Are you passionate about guiding new business owners toward lasting success? Farmers Insurance District 40 is seeking a driven and strategic New Agency Business Advisor to mentor and support emerging agency owners as they lay the groundwork for sustainable growth.

 

As a New Agency Business Advisor, you will become a trusted partner to new agency owners, helping them craft strong business plans, develop effective sales strategies, and implement best practices. This influential role allows you to shape the future of multiple start-up agencies while advancing your own leadership career in a dynamic environment.

 

Why Farmers Insurance?

 

At Farmers, you’ll join one of the industry’s most respected and recognized organizations. Within District 40, you’ll collaborate with high-achieving professionals, leveraging top-tier resources and mentorship opportunities designed to advance both your impact and your leadership growth.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Guide new agency owners through the start-up journey, from licensing to successful business launch

 - Collaborate with owners to create customized strategies focused on sales, marketing, and customer retention

 - Offer practical support for recruiting, onboarding, and training agency staff

 - Track early agency performance, conduct regular reviews, and deliver targeted coaching for faster growth

 - Recommend operational enhancements, technology solutions, and optimized business processes

 - Train agency owners on Farmers products, underwriting guidelines, and emerging industry trends

 - Mentor and advise new agency owners, helping them overcome challenges and achieve long-term success

 

What We’re Looking For

 

We’re searching for a proactive leader with a passion for coaching and a genuine commitment to helping others thrive.

 

 - 2+ years of experience in business consulting, sales leadership, or agency operations

 - Sharp analytical and strategic thinking skills with a focus on results

 - Outstanding communication, coaching, and relationship-building abilities

 - Self-motivated, organized, and adept at managing several agency partnerships at once

 - Insurance experience and active P&C or Life & Health licenses (required)

 

What’s in It for You?

 

 - Competitive salary with performance-based incentives

 - A unique opportunity to impact the growth of multiple new agencies

 - Access to leadership development programs and continuous learning

 - A chance to help shape the next generation of Farmers Insurance agencies

 - Supportive and collaborative district culture focused on success

 

Ready to Build Something Great?

 

This is more than a job—it’s your opportunity to empower entrepreneurs, drive agency growth, and play a vital role in Farmers Insurance’s continued success.

 

Combine your expertise with your passion for mentorship. Apply today and become a catalyst for new agency success!

source_jobs.title: Insurance Leadership Trainee - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Build a Fulfilling Customer Service Career in Insurance – Join the Morgan Raleigh Agency

 

Are you passionate about helping others and driven by delivering exceptional customer experiences? The Morgan Raleigh Agency, backed by Farmers Insurance, is seeking dedicated individuals for our Insurance Leadership Trainee program. If you have a customer service mindset and want to make a genuine impact while growing your career, this opportunity is for you.

 

About the Morgan Raleigh Agency

 

We take pride in celebrating team achievements and supporting individual professional development. At the Morgan Raleigh Agency, you'll receive hands-on customer service training, ongoing mentorship, and a path to future leadership opportunities, including the possibility of running your own agency. Our supportive environment values personal growth, continuous learning, and recognizing outstanding customer care.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

As an Insurance Leadership Trainee, you will:

 - Help agency growth by connecting with clients and providing excellent service

 - Conduct personalized consultations to understand client needs and recommend suitable insurance solutions

 - Work with a full portfolio of insurance products: Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial

 - Develop relationships that strengthen client loyalty and lead to referrals

 - Support team and individual customer service goals

 - Stay updated on insurance products and solutions through regular training

 - Use CRM tools efficiently to manage client information and communication

 - Participate in collaborative team meetings and agency improvement projects

 

Qualifications

 

The ideal trainee brings:

 - One year or more of experience in customer service, sales, or insurance (preferred)

 - Strong communication and listening skills

 - A knack for building trust and resolving questions with patience

 - Positive attitude, eagerness to learn, and openness to feedback

 - Dependable organization and time management abilities

 - Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health licenses (preferred or willingness to earn)

 - Bilingual abilities are a plus

 

Benefits and Growth Opportunities

 

Your commitment to customer satisfaction is rewarded with:

 - Competitive base pay and generous commission potential

 - Bonuses for outstanding service and goal achievement

 - Paid comprehensive training and opportunities for career growth

 - Clear advancement path toward management and agency ownership

 - Supportive and friendly team culture

 - Health insurance options (per agency policy)

 - Paid time off, holiday pay, and recognition programs

 - The strong backing of the Farmers Insurance brand

 

Begin Your Career in Insurance Customer Service

 

Join us as an Insurance Leadership Trainee and be part of a team committed to making a difference for every customer. If you are ready to use your customer service skills to help others, build your expertise, and work toward a leadership future, we want to hear from you.

 

Apply today to start your rewarding journey with the Morgan Raleigh Agency.

source_jobs.title: Agent Apprentice - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Agent Apprentice – Farmers Insurance | Chris McRay Agency – Jenison, MI

 

About the Opportunity

 

Are you ready to launch a rewarding and dynamic sales career with a respected name in the insurance industry? The Chris McRay Agency, a proud member of Farmers Insurance, is seeking an ambitious Agent Apprentice to join our high-performing team in Jenison, MI.

 

As an Agent Apprentice, you will drive new business, deliver personalized insurance solutions, and thrive in a collaborative environment dedicated to exceeding sales targets. This role is ideal for individuals with strong communication skills, a love of closing deals, and a passion for helping clients protect what matters most.

 

About the Chris McRay Agency

 

Our agency is committed to supporting the growth of both clients and employees. We foster a vibrant, recognition-focused work culture where professional development and achievement are top priorities. Whether you bring insurance expertise or are new to sales, we offer full training, mentorship, and clear pathways to advancement, including leadership development and future agency ownership.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Prospect new clients, conduct outreach, and convert leads into policies

 - Consult with clients to identify insurance needs and recommend tailored solutions

 - Sell and cross-sell a range of insurance products: Auto, Home, Life, Commercial

 - Build and maintain strong client relationships through ongoing support and policy reviews

 - Surpass individual sales goals to help drive agency growth

 - Stay updated on product knowledge and compliance standards

 - Use CRM tools to manage leads, follow-ups, and renewals

 - Engage in team meetings and strategic sales initiatives

 

Ideal Candidate

 

Applicants must have prior sales experience or a proven record of meeting goals. Only those who demonstrate these skills will be considered.

We are seeking sales-driven, self-motivated professionals. The ideal Agent Apprentice will have:

 

 - One year or more of sales, customer service, or insurance experience (preferred)

 - Excellent communication and persuasive negotiation skills

 - Confidence in making outbound sales calls and closing deals

 - Enthusiasm for coaching and continuous learning

 - Strong organizational and time management abilities

 - Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health license (preferred, or willingness to obtain)

 - Bilingual skills, a plus

 

Why Join Us?

 

 - Competitive base salary plus unlimited commission earning potential

 - Performance bonuses and sales incentives

 - Hands-on sales training and ongoing professional growth

 - Advancement opportunities, including a clear path to agency ownership

 - Supportive, high-achieving team environment

 - Health insurance options (depending on agency)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and milestone incentives

 - The strength and backing of the Farmers Insurance brand

 

Take the Next Step in Your Sales Career

 

Becoming an Agent Apprentice at the Chris McRay Agency is the springboard to long-term sales success. If you’re driven to excel in sales and grow your income, we encourage you to apply.

 

Submit your application today and kickstart your rewarding sales career with Farmers Insurance.

source_jobs.title: Agent in Training - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Agent in Training – Nick Myers | Farmers Insurance – Portage, MI

 

Compensation: Base + Commission (Uncapped Earning Potential)
Experience Level: Entry-Level to Experienced

 

About Us

 

Farmers Insurance has been helping people protect their dreams since 1928. We’re more than just an insurance company. We’re a nationwide community of agents and clients who care. Our team is driven, genuine, and empowered with cutting-edge tools, top-notch training, and ongoing support that help us thrive in our careers every day.

 

We’re expanding and searching for our next sales superstar to join the Nick Myers Agency in Portage, MI. Are you outgoing, persuasive, and love connecting with people? Do you get excited about building your own business and making a difference for others? If this sounds like you, then this could be the life-changing opportunity you’ve been waiting for!

 

What You’ll Be Doing

 

 - Growing your client base through networking and getting involved locally

 - Educating customers about our full range of insurance products, including auto, home, life, business, and specialty coverage

 - Listening closely to clients’ needs and putting together smart, personalized insurance plans

 - Guiding each client from start to finish, from the first conversation through welcoming them as policyholders and supporting them after the sale

 - Building lasting relationships through regular follow-ups, policy reviews, and going above and beyond with service

 - Striving not just to meet sales targets but to go further by creating memorable client experiences

 - Keeping up with the latest insurance trends and learning everything you can about what Farmers Insurance offers

 

What We’re Looking For

 

 - Friendly, outgoing communicators who love building relationships

 - Driven self-starters passionate about success in sales

 - Well-organized team players who work well independently and manage their time confidently

 - Any sales or client-facing experience is great, but it’s not required

 - Willingness to get or maintain a state insurance license for Life and Property & Casualty

 - Bilingual abilities are a huge plus!

 

Why Start Your Career with Us?

 

 - Hands-on onboarding and continuous training that sets you up to succeed

 - Competitive base salary and unlimited commission potential—how much you earn is up to you

 - Lots of support with marketing and leads to help you hit the ground running

 - One-on-one coaching and room to grow, whether you dream of leading or owning your own agency

 - Access to the University of Farmers for world-class training

 - A clear path to becoming your own agency owner

 - Enjoy a predictable work schedule with evenings and weekends off

 

If you’re ready to launch a sales career where you can grow, make a difference, and be part of a team that inspires you, apply today to join Nick Myers’ Farmers Insurance Agency in Portage, MI!

source_jobs.title: Insurance Agent - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Insurance Agent – Farmers Insurance | Ryan Underhill Agency

 

Are you ready to ignite your sales career with a respected, powerhouse brand in the insurance world? The Ryan Underhill Agency with Farmers Insurance is on the hunt for an ambitious, energetic Insurance Agent to join our winning team and make your mark in a fast-paced, high-reward environment!

 

Fast-Track Your Success in Sales

 

Step into a role where you’ll drive revenue, spark relationships, and help clients protect what they value most. If you thrive on the thrill of the sale, love building connections, and want to genuinely make a difference—this opportunity is for you.

 

Applicants should have previous sales experience or a record of smashing their goals. We’re interested in motivated, goal-driven talent ready to work hard and earn big!

 

Why Choose the Ryan Underhill Agency?

 

We don’t just sell insurance—we build futures. At the Ryan Underhill Agency, your success matters. Experience a dynamic, achievement-focused work culture that champions your growth and helps you level up professionally. Whether you’re a seasoned seller or just setting out, you’ll get:

 

 - Dedicated training and supportive mentorship

 - A proven pathway to leadership and agency ownership

 - The encouragement and resources you need to realize your ambitions

 

What You'll Do:

 

 - Chase down new business through cold calls, outreach, and turning leads into loyal clients

 - Consult with clients to uncover their unique needs and create custom-fit insurance plans

 - Sell and cross-sell a full suite of Farmers Insurance products—Auto, Home, Life, Commercial, and more

 - Build relationships that last, from onboarding to regular policy check-ins

 - Shatter personal sales records and fuel explosive agency growth

 - Stay sharp on industry news, products, and compliance

 - Harness leading-edge CRM tools to stay organized and on top

 - Collaborate with a driven team that celebrates every win

 

Who Succeeds Here?

 

To crush it as an Insurance Agent, you should be:

 

 - Energized by sales and hungry for success

 - Outgoing, persuasive, and an expert communicator

 - Confident on the phone, in meetings, and at closing time

 - Eager to learn, coachable, and growth-minded

 - Highly organized and a master of time management

 - Licensed in Property & Casualty or Life & Health insurance—or willing to get licensed fast!

 - Bilingual skills—a definite plus!

 

Here’s What You Get:

 

 - Guaranteed base salary + unlimited commission (your earning potential is sky-high)

 - Performance bonuses that reward you for crushing your goals

 - Paid training and ongoing education

 - Clear advancement to future leadership or your own agency

 - Flexible schedules (hybrid opportunities may be available)

 - An upbeat, close-knit team environment

 - Access to health insurance options (based on agency offerings)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and milestone bonuses

 - Work with a respected brand that’s renowned for excellence

 

Ready to Claim Your Future?

 

Joining the Ryan Underhill Agency isn’t just a job—it’s the launchpad to your dream sales career. Bring your ambition, commitment, and confidence, and we’ll give you every tool to succeed and soar.

 

Take charge of your future—apply now and start your journey with the Ryan Underhill Agency and Farmers Insurance!

source_jobs.title: Agent Trainee - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
AGENT TRAINEE – FARMERS INSURANCE (JUSTIN PRICE AGENCY, JONESVILLE, MI)

Join the Agency in Jonesville, MI!

 

Justin Price Agency, a leading Farmers Insurance agency in the Jonesville area, is known for delivering dedicated client service, a results-driven team environment, and a strong local reputation. We value professionalism, personal growth, and a commitment to helping our clients secure their futures.

 

About the Role

 

We’re seeking a motivated and goal-oriented Agent Trainee to join our high-performing team. As an Agent Trainee at the Justin Price Agency, you will play a key role in generating new business, providing tailored insurance solutions, and contributing to a positive, collaborative workplace.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Drive new business through prospecting, outreach, and converting leads into new policies

 - Consult with clients to assess insurance needs and recommend appropriate coverage options

 - Sell and cross-sell insurance products, including Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial lines

 - Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, offering ongoing support and regular policy reviews

 - Meet or exceed individual sales targets, supporting the agency’s growth goals

 - Stay current on product knowledge and industry compliance

 - Maintain accurate records using CRM tools for leads, follow-ups, and renewals

 - Participate in team meetings and collaborative strategy sessions

 

Qualifications

 

 - 1+ year of sales, customer service, or insurance experience preferred

 - Strong communication and negotiation skills

 - Confidence in making outbound calls and closing sales

 - Willingness to learn and a coachable attitude

 - Excellent organization and time management skills

 - Active Michigan Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health licenses (preferred, or willingness to obtain)

 - Bilingual abilities are a plus

 

Why Join Justin Price Agency?

 

 - Base salary plus uncapped commissions

 - Performance bonuses and additional incentives

 - Paid training and ongoing professional development

 - Opportunities for career advancement, including a pathway to agency ownership

 - Supportive, team-oriented culture in a respected agency

 - Health insurance support (depending on offerings)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and milestone rewards

 - A reputable brand with a long-standing legacy in insurance excellence

 

Take Your Career to the Next Level

 

Become a part of the Justin Price Agency and Farmers Insurance, where your ambition and drive are rewarded, and your future can flourish. If you’re ready to succeed and grow your professional career, we want to hear from you.

 

Apply today and take the first step toward a rewarding insurance career in Jonesville, MI!

source_jobs.title: Farmers Insurance - Risk Advisor
source_jobs.description:
Risk Advisor – Farmers Insurance | Kara Ruehs Agency, Ionia

 

Are you passionate about helping others and ready to embark on a purpose-driven career in insurance? The Kara Ruehs Agency, a distinguished Farmers Insurance partner, is seeking a dedicated Risk Advisor to join our exceptional team in Ionia.

 

As a Risk Advisor, you'll play a pivotal role in growing our agency by delivering expert guidance and customized insurance solutions to our valued clients. You’ll have the opportunity to forge strong relationships, provide proactive risk assessments, and act as a trusted advocate for individuals, families, and businesses as they protect their futures.

 

If you excel at identifying client needs, thrive in a team environment, and have a proven ability to achieve results, we encourage you to apply and advance your career with us!

 

About the Kara Ruehs Agency

 

At our agency, we take pride in shaping brighter futures for clients and colleagues alike. We offer robust training, effective mentorship, and meaningful growth opportunities—inclusive of leadership development and an established track to agency ownership. Our supportive culture values achievement, continuous improvement, and collaborative success.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Discover and connect with prospective clients, converting leads into enduring policies

 - Consult with clients on their unique risks and recommend tailored insurance strategies

 - Sell and cross-sell Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial insurance products

 - Establish and nurture long-term client relationships by offering ongoing expertise and support

 - Consistently surpass sales objectives while maintaining compliance standards

 - Keep up-to-date with evolving insurance products and industry guidelines

 - Leverage CRM systems to manage prospects, follow-ups, and renewals

 - Actively contribute to team meetings and innovative sales initiatives

 

Who We’re Looking For

 

 - 1+ year of sales, customer service, or insurance experience preferred

 - Exceptional communication and negotiation skills

 - Comfortable initiating outreach and expertly closing sales

 - Highly organized, coachable, and self-motivated

 - Strong time management abilities

 - Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health license preferred (or commitment to obtain)

 - Bilingual candidates highly encouraged to apply

 

Why Choose the Kara Ruehs Agency?

 

 - Competitive base salary with unlimited commission earning potential

 - Performance incentives and comprehensive paid training

 - Structured career growth with a clear path to agency ownership

 - Flexible scheduling options

 - Achievement-oriented, encouraging team culture

 - Health insurance support (when available)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and special incentives

 - Join a stable, respected brand recognized for excellence

 

Ready to Make an Impact?

 

Take the leap and build a meaningful, rewarding career as a Risk Advisor with the Kara Ruehs Agency and Farmers Insurance. Apply today to discover your unlimited growth opportunity!

source_jobs.title: Agent in Training - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Agent in Training – Kelsie Porter Agency | Farmers Insurance – Howell, MI

 

Compensation: Base + Commission (Uncapped Earning Potential)
Experience Level: Entry-Level to Experienced

 

About Us

 

Farmers Insurance has been a trusted name in protecting American families and businesses since 1928. We’re proud to empower our agents through cutting-edge technology, top-tier training, and dedicated support to help them succeed.

 

The Kelsie Porter Agency is expanding in Howell and seeking enthusiastic individuals to join us as Insurance Agents in Training. If you thrive in a people-focused environment, want to make a difference in your community, and are eager to build a fulfilling career in sales, we want to meet you!

 

What You’ll Do

 - Develop and grow your client base through networking, referrals, and local engagement

 - Guide clients through our diverse insurance products including auto, home, life, business, and specialty coverage

 - Assess each client’s unique needs to create personalized insurance solutions

 - Oversee the sales process—from lead generation and consultations to presenting recommendations and closing policies

 - Build trust and maintain strong, long-term client relationships with proactive follow-up and exceptional service

 - Achieve and surpass sales goals while always providing genuine value to clients

 - Keep up-to-date with insurance industry changes and new product offerings

 

Who You Are

 - Excellent communicator with a talent for building rapport

 - Motivated, goal-oriented, and entrepreneurial

 - Able to work independently and stay organized

 - Sales or customer service experience is a plus, but not required

 - Willing to obtain or maintain an insurance license (Life, Property & Casualty)

 - Bilingual abilities are welcomed

 

Why Join Us?

 - Extensive training and mentorship—get paid as you learn

 - Competitive base salary plus unlimited commission potential

 - Robust marketing support and lead generation resources

 - Ongoing professional coaching and clear advancement opportunities

 - Access to the University of Farmers training platform

 - Pathway to become your own agency owner

 - Work-life balance with evenings and weekends off

 

Are you ready to launch a meaningful career, deliver real value to your clients, and grow with an established agency? Apply now to join the Kelsie Porter Agency at Farmers Insurance in Howell, MI!

source_jobs.title: Agent in Training - Bryan Thomasson Agency
source_jobs.description:

source_jobs.title: Agent Apprentice - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Agent Apprentice – Farmers Insurance | Eric Rodriguez Agency, Long Beach, CA

 

Spanish Bilingual Preferred!

 

Ignite Your Sales Career with a Leading Insurance Agency!

Your Path to Success

 - Access top-tier tools and the strength of a nationally recognized insurance brand.

 - Enjoy a positive, high-energy culture that rewards achievement and supports professional growth.

 

What You’ll Tackle

What You Bring

 - Excellent communication and negotiation skills

 - Eagerness to learn, adapt, and take coaching

Why You'll Love It Here

 - Clear path for career growth, including potential agency ownership

Ready to Make Your Mark?

Apply now and jumpstart your journey toward success with a team—and a future—you’ll be proud of!

ABOUT THE POSITION

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Foster and maintain lasting client relationships through responsive service

 - Track sales activities, follow up on leads, and manage renewals with CRM software

 - Remain compliant with state and company regulations

 


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Strong organizational skills and initiative

WHAT WE OFFER

 - Paid initial training and ongoing professional development

 - Career progression opportunities within the Farmers Insurance system

 - Paid time off, holidays, and recognition programs

ABOUT US

APPLY NOW

If you’re ready to advance your insurance career and want to work with a dedicated team committed to your success, apply today for the Insurance Account Representative role at the Mario Bujas Agency. Grow your potential and help clients achieve peace of mind with Farmers Insurance.

source_jobs.title: Insurance Leadership Trainee- Farmers Insurance

INSURANCE LEADERSHIP TRAINEE

Are you ready to launch a successful sales career with one of the most respected names in the insurance industry? Farmers Insurance is seeking a driven, ambitious Insurance Leadership Trainee to join our dynamic and top-performing agency.

 

As an Insurance Leadership Trainee, you’ll be central to increasing revenue, delivering tailored insurance solutions, and contributing to a strong, goal-focused sales team. This role is ideal for someone with strong communication skills, a passion for sales, and a desire to help clients protect what matters most.

 

This opportunity requires prior sales experience or a proven track record of consistently achieving targets. Only candidates who meet these requirements will be considered.

 


ABOUT OUR AGENCY

At Farmers Insurance, we focus on building successful futures for both our clients and our team members. Our agency fosters a collaborative, energetic environment that acknowledges achievement and supports genuine career growth. Whether you’re an experienced sales professional or just starting out, you’ll benefit from expert training, mentorship, and a clearly defined path to leadership roles and agency ownership.

 


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

As an Insurance Leadership Trainee, your main responsibilities will include:

 

 - Generating new business by identifying prospects, making outbound calls, and converting leads into sales

 - Conducting in-depth client consultations to evaluate insurance needs and recommend suitable coverage options

 - Selling and cross-selling a range of insurance products such as Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial policies

 - Building and maintaining strong relationships with clients, offering ongoing support and regular policy reviews

 - Consistently meeting and surpassing individual sales goals to drive agency growth

 - Staying current with insurance products and compliance standards

 - Utilizing CRM tools to track leads, manage follow-ups, and handle policy renewals

 - Actively participating in team meetings and contributing to sales strategies

 


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We want dedicated sales professionals who are proactive and highly motivated. The ideal candidate will possess:

 

 - At least 1 year of sales, customer service, or insurance experience (preferred)

 - Excellent communication and negotiation skills

 - Confidence making outbound sales calls and closing deals

 - A willingness to learn, adapt, and accept coaching

 - Strong organizational skills and effective time management

 - Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health licenses (preferred or willingness to obtain)

 - Bilingual skills are a plus

 


WHAT WE OFFER

Your sales talent will be recognized and rewarded with:

 

 - Competitive base salary plus unlimited commission earning potential

 - Performance bonuses and rewards for top sales achievements

 - Paid training and professional development opportunities

 - Clear advancement path, including opportunities for leadership and agency ownership

 - Flexible work schedule options, with potential hybrid work arrangements

 - Supportive team environment focused on results and recognition

 - Health insurance support (with select agency plans)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and achievement incentives

 - The backing of a trusted and established insurance brand

 


TAKE THE NEXT STEP IN YOUR SALES CAREER

Apply now and take the first step towards a high-impact, sales-driven career at Farmers Insurance.

source_jobs.title: Insurance Sales Consultant- Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Insurance Sales Consultant – Mark Roberts Agency | Farmers Insurance – Sturgis, MI

 

Compensation: Base + Commission (Uncapped Earning Potential)
Experience Level: Entry-Level to Experienced

 

About Us:

 

Farmers Insurance has proudly served America with a full suite of insurance and financial products since 1928. As one of the most recognized names in the industry, we empower our agents with comprehensive tools, advanced training, and unwavering support to help them grow a successful and rewarding sales career.

 

We are seeking motivated, persuasive individuals to join our expanding team as Insurance Sales Consultants in Sturgis, MI. If you are passionate about sales and thrive on building strong client relationships, this is your chance to make a meaningful impact in your community.

 

What You’ll Do:

 

 - Drive sales growth by building and expanding a client base through networking, proactive outreach, and community engagement.

 - Clearly communicate product benefits and provide personalized education to clients across auto, home, life, business, and specialty insurance products.

 - Conduct needs assessments and design tailored insurance solutions that address each client’s goals.

 - Manage all stages of the sales process: identifying prospects, conducting consultations, presenting solutions, and closing sales.

 - Develop lasting relationships through regular client communication, follow-ups, and policy reviews to maximize satisfaction and retention.

 - Consistently achieve and exceed sales targets while prioritizing long-term customer loyalty.

 - Stay ahead of industry trends and maintain in-depth knowledge of Farmers Insurance products.

 

What We’re Looking For:

 

 - Outstanding communication, interpersonal, and relationship-building skills.

 - A driven, entrepreneurial attitude with a passion for sales success.

 - Ability to work independently and manage a dynamic pipeline with effective time management.

 - Previous sales or client-facing experience is preferred

 - Willingness to obtain or maintain a state insurance license (Life, Property & Casualty).

 - Bilingual abilities are a plus.

 

Why Choose Farmers:

 

 - Extensive onboarding and ongoing training designed for sales excellence.

 - Competitive base financial support plus uncapped commission potential.

 - Marketing and lead generation support to fuel your business.

 - Professional coaching and ample opportunities for career growth.

 - Access to the industry-leading University of Farmers training program.

 - Enjoy evenings and weekends off.

 

If you’re ready to launch a successful sales career and play a valuable role in your clients’ lives, apply today to join the Mark Roberts Agency team in Sturgis, MI!

source_jobs.title: Talent Aquisition Coordinator- Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
JOB TITLE: TALENT ACQUISITION COORDINATOR

Company: Farmers Insurance – District 40
Location: Lansing
Employment Type: Full-Time

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

Farmers Insurance – District 40 is experiencing significant growth and is looking for a driven, energetic Talent Acquisition Coordinator to bolster our talent acquisition efforts. This is an excellent entry-level opportunity for someone eager to launch a career in recruiting. If you are organized, personable, and thrive in a fast-paced, goal-oriented environment, you will find success and development with us.

 


RESPONSIBILITIES


TALENT SOURCING & OUTREACH

 - Proactively identify and engage qualified candidates through job boards, referrals, and direct outreach

 - Build and maintain a strong pipeline of prospective talent

 - Cultivate relationships with candidates, ensuring clear and ongoing communication

 


CANDIDATE SCREENING

 - Conduct initial phone screens and evaluate candidates for suitability

 - Assess candidate alignment with position requirements, culture fit, communication skills, and motivation

 - Efficiently move qualified candidates through each stage of the interview process

 


PIPELINE & PROCESS MANAGEMENT

 - Accurately track candidates using CRM and recruiting tools

 - Manage interview scheduling and facilitate coordination with leadership

 - Ensure consistent follow-up to keep candidates engaged throughout the process

 


RECRUITING SUPPORT

 - Learn and implement best recruiting practices from seasoned team leaders

 - Monitor recruiting metrics, including call volume, interviews scheduled, and hires made

 


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills

 - Highly organized with strong attention to detail

 - Self-motivated, goal-driven, and results-oriented

 - Comfortable conducting outreach calls and establishing rapport with new contacts

 - Able to manage competing priorities in a dynamic environment

 


PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - Experience in sales, customer service, or recruiting

 - Familiarity with CRM or applicant tracking systems

 - Interest in recruiting, HR, or business operations

 


WHY JOIN FARMERS INSURANCE – DISTRICT 40?

 - Join a growth-focused, high-performance organization

 - Collaborate directly with leaders and agency owners

 - Gain hands-on experience in talent acquisition, sales, and business development

 - Build a foundation for a long-term career with Farmers Insurance

 

Ready to take the next step in your career? Apply now and become a key member of our dynamic team at Farmers Insurance – District 40, where your talent and drive will help shape our continued success.

About the Ben Charney Agency

 

At our agency, investing in our clients and team is our top priority. We pride ourselves on a positive culture with a strong emphasis on growth, learning, and advancement—whether you’re new to insurance or ready to further develop your skills. We provide comprehensive training, ongoing mentorship, and a pathway to meaningful career progression, including leadership and even agency ownership opportunities.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Consult with clients to identify their insurance needs and recommend appropriate solutions

 - Build relationships and provide exceptional client service throughout the policy lifecycle

 - Help clients navigate and select Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial insurance products

 - Actively generate new business and manage leads, follow-ups, and renewals through our CRM

 - Set and achieve individual sales goals, contributing to team and agency growth

 - Stay updated on insurance offerings and compliance standards

 - Participate in team meetings, sales strategy sessions, and ongoing training

 

Who We’re Looking For

 

 - At least 1 year of sales, customer service, or insurance experience (preferred)

 - Excellent communication and relationship-building skills

 - Confidence in making outbound calls and closing new business

 - Eagerness to learn, adapt, and grow in a fast-paced environment

 - Organized, self-motivated, and detail-oriented

 - Bilingual skills are a plus

 

Why Choose the Ben Charney Agency?

 

 - Competitive base salary with uncapped commissions

 - Performance bonuses and incentive programs

 - Paid training and professional development

 - Opportunities for rapid advancement, including a path to agency ownership

 - Supportive company culture that values each team member’s contributions

 - Health insurance support options (depending on agency offerings)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and milestone rewards

 - Backed by the trusted Farmers Insurance brand

 

Ready to Join Us?

 

If you’re a great communicator, passionate about helping others, and motivated by achievement, this is your chance to reinvent your career as a Client Advisor. Apply today and start making a real impact with the Ben Charney Agency and Farmers Insurance.

source_jobs.title: Agent in Training - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Agent in Training – The Nathan Bowers Agency (Farmers Insurance) – Holland

 

Are you a driven sales professional ready to ignite your earning potential? The Nathan Bowers Agency, a top-performing Farmers Insurance team in Holland, is searching for a competitive, ambitious Agent in Training to help power our growth and dominate the market.

 

In this high-impact sales role, you’ll be at the forefront of revenue generation—identifying prospects, closing deals, and delivering targeted insurance solutions. If you thrive on exceeding goals, love the adrenaline of the chase, and are passionate about helping clients secure their futures, this is your launchpad to a lucrative and dynamic career.

 

What You’ll Do:

 - Regularly prospect, connect with, and convert leads for new and repeat business

 - Conduct needs-based consultations to deliver tailored insurance solutions

 - Master a full product suite—Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial—and cross-sell to maximize value per client

 - Build retention through relationship management, upselling, and regular policy reviews

 - Routinely crush individual sales targets and elevate agency growth

 - Stay sharp on product strategy and industry standards

 - Rigorously use CRM tools for pipeline management, follow-ups, and renewals

 - Engage in team sales competitions and contribute to bold growth initiatives

 

The Ideal Candidate:

 - Minimum 1 year of sales, customer service, or insurance experience

 - Embodies a hunter’s mentality—tenacious, proactive, and resilient

 - Skilled closer with outstanding communication and negotiation abilities

 - Comfortable with high-volume outbound activity

 - Hungry to learn, highly coachable, and relentlessly goal-driven

 - Organized executor, capable of managing a robust pipeline

 - Holds or is willing to obtain Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health licenses

 - Bilingual? You’ll blaze even more trails

 

Why Join Our Winning Team?

 - Base salary plus unlimited, uncapped commissions—your earnings are in your hands!

 - High-stakes bonuses and competitive incentive programs

 - Paid, world-class training that sharpens your sales edge

 - Real promotion opportunities—including a direct path to agency ownership

 - Flexible scheduling options (hybrid available)

 - Output-driven, highly supportive sales culture

 - Health insurance support and paid time off available (depending on agency)

 - Become the face of a powerful, respected brand

 

Your Next Big Sales Win Starts Here

 

This isn’t just another job—it’s your ticket to an explosive sales career in the insurance industry. Accelerate your success with the Nathan Bowers Agency, where your hustle is rewarded and your ambition knows no ceiling.

 

Ready to break sales records and rise to agency leadership? Apply today and make your mark at The Nathan Bowers Agency!

source_jobs.title: Farmers Insurance - Agent Trainee
source_jobs.description:
Agent Trainee – Farmers Insurance (Holly Benson Agency, Holt)

 

Are you ready to launch your sales career with a reputable insurance leader? The Holly Benson Agency, a proud member of Farmers Insurance District 40 in Holt, is seeking a motivated, energetic, and results-driven Agent Trainee to join our exceptional team! In this engaging role, you’ll drive agency growth, provide personalized insurance guidance, and contribute to a high-achieving, positive work environment.

 

This opportunity is ideal for individuals who excel in communication, are passionate about sales, and genuinely want to help customers protect what’s important to them. Previous sales experience or a proven ability to meet goals is a strong advantage!

 

About Our Agency

 

At the Holly Benson Agency, part of Farmers Insurance, we are dedicated to empowering both clients and our team members to achieve their highest potential. Become part of a collaborative, supportive environment that values growth and shared success, where your drive is matched with comprehensive training, mentorship, and resources to help you thrive!

 

What You’ll Do

 

As an Agent Trainee, you will:

 

 - Proactively seek new business opportunities and build strong relationships

 - Conduct client consultations to understand needs and recommend tailored insurance solutions

 - Sell and cross-sell Auto, Home, Life, and Commercial insurance products

 - Develop ongoing client relationships through exceptional service and regular communication

 - Surpass individual sales targets to drive agency growth

 - Stay informed about product updates, compliance, and underwriting practices

 - Utilize CRM tools to manage leads, follow-ups, and policy renewals

 - Participate in team meetings and contribute to sales strategies

 

Who We’re Looking For

 

 - Minimum 1 year of sales, customer service, or insurance experience (preferred)

 - Strong communication, negotiation, and people skills

 - Comfortable with outbound calling and closing sales

 - Willingness to learn, grow, and accept feedback

 - Excellent organization and time management abilities

 - Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health license (preferred, or willingness to obtain)

 - Bilingual skills are a plus!

 

Why Join Us?

 

 - Base salary plus unlimited commissions

 - Bonus and incentive programs

 - Comprehensive paid training & ongoing development

 - Clear advancement opportunities within the agency

 - Supportive, team-focused culture that celebrates success

 - Health insurance assistance (varies by agency)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and milestone recognition

 - Backed by the nationally respected Farmers Insurance brand with over 90 years of excellence

 

Next Steps – Ignite Your Career!

 

Becoming an Agent Trainee with the Holly Benson Agency is more than a job—it’s the first step toward a meaningful and rewarding career in insurance. If you’re driven, client-focused, and ready to grow, we’d love to hear from you!

 

Apply now and start building your future with the Holly Benson Agency and Farmers Insurance!

source_jobs.title: Life Insurance Specialist - Farmers Insurance District 40
source_jobs.description:
Life Insurance Specialist | Farmers Insurance District 40, Michigan

 

About the Role:

 

Farmers Insurance District 40 is searching for a dedicated Life Insurance Specialist to join our district office team in Michigan. If you are passionate about helping people protect their future and thrive in a collaborative, supportive environment, this is your opportunity to shine.

 

Responsibilities:

 

As a Life Insurance Specialist, you will sell life insurance policies directly to individual clients and provide hands-on guidance to our district agents. You'll lead informative trainings to help agents succeed in life insurance sales, support the quoting and binding process, and help close policies while sharing in commissions for policies you contribute to. Your goal will be to foster strong relationships, cross-sell to existing clients, and bring in new business through networking and thoughtful outreach.

 

You’ll also assist with daily office operations, such as handling quotes, policy reviews, and follow-ups, and play a key part in building the district’s overall success. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both client-facing sales and agent development, and who’s motivated to grow their own book of business within a respected organization.

 

What We’re Looking For:

 - At least 1 year of insurance sales experience (life insurance preferred)

 - Active Michigan Life Insurance License

 - Strong entrepreneurial spirit and drive to build lasting client relationships

 - Excellent communication and presentation skills

 - Organized, self-motivated, and goal-oriented

 - Team player who thrives on collaboration and supporting others

 

What We Offer:

 - Comprehensive onboarding and ongoing training

 - Opportunities to lead and facilitate agent trainings

 - Commission splits and additional performance incentives

 - Support from experienced district leaders and mentors

 - Access to robust marketing resources and the backing of the Farmers Insurance brand

 - A welcoming, growth-focused office culture

 

Ready to Take the Next Step?

 

If you’re excited to make a difference, work with a top-performing team, and advance your career in life insurance sales, apply now to join Farmers Insurance District 40!

 

Job Type: Contract, In-office (Michigan)

source_jobs.title: Insurance Sales Consultant - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
INSURANCE SALES CONSULTANT – FARMERS INSURANCE | TERRY SMITH AGENCY – BATTLE CREEK

Are you looking for a customer-service driven career and not just a job? The Terry Smith Agency with Farmers Insurance invites you to embark on a long-term professional journey where you can advance, grow, and build a rewarding future in the insurance industry. We are seeking a service-minded, goal-focused Insurance Sales Consultant ready to develop lifelong skills and become a trusted advisor to our clients.

 

Build a Career that Centers on Service

 

As an Insurance Sales Consultant, you’ll play a crucial role in our agency’s lasting success. Your focus on client satisfaction and quality service will establish your reputation, impact the community, and position you for future growth. If you possess strong communication skills, a results-driven mindset, and a passion for helping people protect their most important assets, you’ll thrive with us.

 

Who Succeeds with Us

 

Applicants should have prior sales or customer service experience, or a demonstrated ability to meet and exceed goals. Only candidates who meet these criteria will be considered for this fulfilling opportunity.

 

About Terry Smith Agency & Farmers Insurance

 

At the Terry Smith Agency, we support ongoing professional growth for both our clients and our team. Our collaborative, service-oriented atmosphere celebrates achievement and career development. Whether you’re experienced in insurance or just beginning your service career, we offer comprehensive training, mentorship, and a clear path to advancement, including opportunities for leadership and agency ownership.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Generating new business by identifying prospects, conducting outreach, and converting leads into lasting policies

 - Consulting with clients to assess their needs and recommending tailored insurance solutions

 - Selling and cross-selling insurance products (Auto, Home, Life, Commercial lines)

 - Developing and maintaining long-term client relationships by providing ongoing support and regular policy reviews

 - Consistently meeting and exceeding customer satisfaction and sales targets

 - Staying current on industry products and maintaining compliance

 - Managing leads, follow-ups, and renewals through CRM systems

 - Participating in team meetings and collaborating on strategies for long-term agency and client success

 

What We’re Looking For

 

 - Minimum 1 year of experience in sales, customer service, or insurance (preferred)

 - Excellent communication and negotiation skills

 - Confidence in making outbound calls and closing sales

 - A willingness to learn, grow, and accept coaching

 - Strong organizational and time management abilities

 - Property & Casualty and/or Life & Health license (preferred, or willingness to obtain)

 - Bilingual skills are a plus

 

Why Build Your Long-Term Career With Us?

 

 - Base salary plus unlimited commission earning potential

 - Performance-based bonuses and incentive programs

 - Paid training with ongoing professional and personal development

 - Structured career advancement and a clear path to leadership or agency ownership

 - Supportive, achievement-focused team culture

 - Health insurance support (depending on agency offerings)

 - Paid time off, holidays, and milestone rewards

 - Association with a respected, stable brand in insurance and financial services

 

Secure Your Future With Us

 

A position with the Terry Smith Agency is more than a sales job, it’s the foundation for a meaningful, lasting career in customer service and insurance. If you’re motivated to develop your skills, grow your earnings, and take control of your professional future, we encourage your application.

 

Apply today and start your path to a fulfilling future with Farmers Insurance and the Terry Smith Agency.

source_jobs.title: Agent in Training - Farmers Insurance
source_jobs.description:
Insurance Agent – Asa Smith | Farmers Insurance – Adrian, MI

 

Compensation: Base Salary + Uncapped Commission
Experience Level: Entry-Level to Experienced

 

About Us

 

Farmers Insurance has protected families and businesses since 1928. As a leading brand in the industry, we empower agents with cutting-edge tools, comprehensive training, and robust support so they can build high-performance sales careers with unlimited growth potential.

 

We are seeking driven, persuasive sales professionals to join our growing team as Insurance Agents in Adrian, MI. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy building relationships, this is your chance to build your own business and help others secure their future.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Drive revenue growth by prospecting, networking, and tapping into community contacts to generate leads and fill your sales pipeline.

 - Present and educate clients on our full suite of insurance products (auto, home, life, business, specialty) using consultative sales techniques.

 - Assess client needs and deliver tailored insurance solutions that provide real value and protection.

 - Manage the full sales cycle: identify prospects, consult, present solutions, and close deals to grow your book of business.

 - Foster lasting relationships and generate referrals through outstanding customer service.

 - Achieve and exceed personal and team sales targets while ensuring exceptional customer satisfaction.

 - Stay current on market trends and product enhancements to remain competitive.

 

Qualifications

 

 - Outgoing, persuasive personality with strong communication and negotiation skills.

 - Entrepreneurial drive, resilience, and a passion for surpassing sales goals.

 - Ability to work independently and manage time to maximize opportunities.

 - Prior sales or client-facing experience preferred but not required.

 - Willingness to obtain and maintain a Michigan insurance license (Life, Property & Casualty).

 - Bilingual applicants are encouraged to apply.

 

Why Join Farmers?

 

 - Comprehensive onboarding and impactful sales training.

 - Guaranteed base pay plus uncapped commission.

 - Marketing support and warm leads to help you build your book of business.

 - Ongoing coaching, mentorship, and clear opportunities for advancement.

 - Access to the renowned University of Farmers training program.

 - Defined pathway to agency ownership for top performers.

 - Evenings and weekends off to support work-life balance.

 

Ready to exceed your goals and make a difference in your clients’ lives? Apply today to join Asa Smith’s high-performing sales team in Adrian, MI!

notes: No tech roles, mostly sales and insurance positions
